_description: Extracted from netgear/cm2000 modem.har: RouterStatus.htm embeds a form whose action carries a per-session ?id= token. Detection emits the Core pre-fetch shape (bare endpoint + endpoint_pattern + pre_fetch_url); form input values are rewritten by page JS before submit (advButtonClick) so params are never extracted — the warning names the fields instead.

content.text:
<html><body>
<form action="/goform/RouterStatus?id=896951128" method="post" onsubmit="return false;">
<button name="reboot" id="reboot" class="purple_button" onClick="advButtonClick(2);">Reboot</button>
<input type="hidden" value="1" name="buttonSelect"/>
<input type="hidden" name="wantype" value="dhcp">
</form>
</body></html>
